hadith_entries.text:
316. Narrated Ibn Omar: may Allah be pleased with them
'Once Allah's Messenger passed by an Ansari (man) who
was admonishing his brother regarding modesty. At that,
Allah's Messenger said: "Leave him as shyness is a part of
faith." (Bukhari)

317. Narrated 'Imran ibn Hosayn : The Prophet said:
"Modesty does not bring anything except good." (Bukhari)

318. Narrated Abu-Huraira: 'The Prophet said:
"Faith (Belief) consists of more than sixty sub-divisions or
branches (parts). And modesty (This term Haya'a covers a
large number of concepts which are to be taken together;
amongst them are self-respect, modesty, bashfulness and
honor, etc.) is a part of faith." (Bukhari)
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
Allah said:
